key_risks: Semiconductor crowding and sharp factor reversal/mean-reversion after 21% 30d run
Hawkish Fed repricing if June CPI (July 14) surprises hot, hitting growth multiples
Oil/energy weakness signaling demand slowdown spilling into cyclicals

portfolio.rationale: Strong momentum, AI capex cycle, leading sector with broad earnings tailwind into July.
Memory/semis exposure, powerful trend, benefiting from AI hardware demand.
Mega-cap tech momentum with solid breadth; benchmark-beating tilt.
Strong Philly Fed new orders, capex theme, broadening rally participation.
Hedge against sticky inflation (CPI 4.2%) and risk-off; diversifies tech beta.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt toward AI/semis leadership where momentum and earnings revisions remain strongest, complemented by Korea for semi beta, industrials for cyclical breadth, and gold as inflation/risk hedge given sticky CPI and hawkish dot plot.
rationale_summary: Overweight AI/semiconductor complex which has dominant momentum into a quiet macro window, with industrials for breadth and gold as hedge.
